Loan Calculator

Calculate your monthly loan payment, total interest paid, and see the full amortization breakdown.

FAQ

How is monthly payment calculated?

Monthly payment = P × [r(1+r)^n] / [(1+r)^n – 1], where P is principal, r is monthly rate, n is number of payments.

What's the difference between APR and interest rate?

APR includes fees and other costs, making it higher than the base interest rate. It represents the true annual cost of borrowing.
